title: ReportWebhook
description: Minecraft plugin to report a player in a discord webhook
body:
# ReportWebhook

Plugin features:
- Embed discord with emojis (👤, 📝, ⚠️) and editable color from config.
- Escape `_` -> `\_` for playernames on discord.
- No self-report.
- `/reports` (to see your reports), `/staffreports` (only staff, to see all reports sent).
- `/staffreports [id] confirm/decline/remove` to confirm/reject a report or to manually delete it
- Auto deletes confirmed/rejected reports after 48h.
- Storage on **SQLite** (default) or **MySQL**.
- Command `/report` has highest priority.
- Full support for Spigot/Paper/Bukkit from 1.13.2 to 1.21.8
- [Source code](https://github.com/davi-fonto/ReportWebhook-Paper) and [Discord](https://discord.gg/ZcVFap86gU)
- Please donate [here](https://paypal.me/MSGamingOfficial) to support the project! Even 1€ is kindly appreciated!

## Permissions
- `/report <player> <reason>` → `report.use` (default)
- `/reports` → `report.use` (default)
- `/staffreports [id] <confirm|decline|remove>` → `report.staff`
